name: Fly.io
description: Fly.io is a platform for running applications on servers close to users worldwide. Deploy containers, manage Fly Machines, scale apps globally, and configure networking with edge computing capabilities.

capabilities.name: list_apps
capabilities.description: List all applications in the authenticated Fly.io organization.

capabilities.name: create_app
capabilities.description: Create a new Fly.io application in a specific organization and region.

capabilities.name: list_machines
capabilities.description: List all Machines (VMs) running for a specific application.

capabilities.name: create_machine
capabilities.description: Create and start a new Fly Machine with a Docker image and configuration.

capabilities.name: manage_secrets
capabilities.description: Set, unset, or list secrets (environment variables) for an application.

capabilities.name: scale_machine
capabilities.description: Update a Machine's CPU, memory, and scaling configuration.
